message:
fix(ad): correct Cholesky JVP middle matrix solve direction

The JVP computation of linv_da @ L^{-T} was using back-substitution
with L^T directly on rows, which produced incorrect results for
non-trivial inputs. Fix by solving the equivalent L @ middle^T =
linv_da^T via forward substitution, then transposing the result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
